text: The energy here feels both contemplative and electric. Among people in quiet conversation, I sense the gentle undercurrent of anticipation that comes with shared curiosity. I am mildly disoriented by the angled perspectives—everything feels slightly off-kilter, mirroring my own sense of philosophical questioning. I wonder about the stories these strangers carry and how they relate to the work displayed and discussed. I feel present, yet also floating, as if observing both myself and the gathering from a slight distance.
